title: Egyptian Apple Tagine
description: A traditional Egyptian dessert made with apples, a hint of cinnamon, and a crunchy topping.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the chopped apples, sugar, melted butter, and ground cinnamon.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Prepare the crunchy tagine topping by mixing together chopped crunchy tagine with 1/4 cup sugar and 1/4 cup melted butter.
Sprinkle the crunchy topping over the apple mixture.
If using rosewater, add it to the apple mixture and mix well.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
